name: Development feature: integrations and webhook UI
description: Verify integration status cards and ICS controls, create a webhook through the UI, verify its signing secret, and delete it.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click the Sign In button and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Profile avatar button, then click Integrations in the dropdown
Wait for integration and webhook status data to load
Verify the Integrations page shows Import an .ics file, Import calendar, Export calendar, and Outgoing webhooks controls
Verify Provider adapters lists Google Calendar, Zoom, Slack, Microsoft 365, and Notion with Connected or Foundation ready status
Type https://8.8.8.8/hooks/testsprite-development into the HTTPS endpoint field
Type TestSprite development UI verification into the Description field and click Add webhook
Wait for the webhook list to refresh
Verify the new webhook row and a one-time signing secret are displayed
Click the Delete webhook button on the https://8.8.8.8/hooks/testsprite-development row
Verify the TestSprite development webhook row is removed, confirming cleanup
